action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 16 trained two LightGBM models (DART val IC 0.0828, GBDT val IC 0.0875) on expanded data (2008-01 to 2021-10) with label normalization. Both models saved as lgb_model_0.txt and lgb_model_1.txt. Analysis: The ensemble should give better generalization than single model. Need to update predict.py to load all lgb_model_*.txt files from checkpoint dir, average predictions, load test data via Alpha158 for test period from eval_config.json, compute daily IC/rank_IC, and output required JSON. Decision: Update predict.py for ensembling, submit eval with both models to get potentially higher test IC.
